description_long: This is a vintage-style briefcase with a rectangular form, covered in a textured beige fabric and reinforced with brown leather or faux leather trim along the edges and corners. The interior is lined with a greenish fabric and contains a custom-fitted control panel featuring various black knobs, dials, and switches, as well as a wooden box with a label. The briefcase has a sturdy, stitched leather handle attached to the front with metal hardware, and two visible latches for closure. The control panel appears to be metallic, with a brushed finish and several labeled sections, suggesting the briefcase is designed to house and transport specialized electronic equipment. The exterior is plain, with no visible logos or external pockets, and the corners are protected by rounded leather patches. The overall construction suggests durability and a utilitarian design, suitable for field use or technical work in urban environments.
description: A vintage beige fabric briefcase with brown leather trim, reinforced corners, and a leather handle, containing a custom electronic control panel and wooden box inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open briefcase, revealing the interior control panel with knobs, switches, and a wooden box, as well as the leather handle and latches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the briefcase, the thickness of the lid, and the arrangement of the control panel and wooden box inside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain beige fabric exterior and brown leather corner reinforcements, with no visible handle or hardware.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back corner, showing the interior layout, the control panel, and the handle partially visible on the side.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed, stitched leather handle attached to the front with metal brackets; rectangular and slightly arched for grip.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two metal latches on the front edge for closure; no visible key or combination lock.
attribute_corner_reinforcements: Brown leather or faux leather rounded patches covering all exterior corners for protection.
